content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 8, 2002

Gary D. Rothstein
Steefel, Levitt & Weiss
One Embarcadero Center
Thirtieth Floor
San Francisco, CA 94111-3719

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-200

Dear Mr. Rothstein:

Pursuant to our phone conversation of August 6, 2002, we have withdrawn your request for advice. You indicated your client, who was not identified in your request but on whose behalf you requested expedited advice, decided to withdraw the request.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
